name: refresh_design
full_help:
refresh_design

Description: 
Refresh the current design

Syntax: 
refresh_design  [-part <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-part]     Target part
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Project

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
